description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to your outfit. This Leatherette belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length: Free size Made of Leatherette for durability and style Metal studs design to increase the smartness quotient Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Brand name embossed on the loop and brand logo embossed on the tail Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
